sections.paragraph:
Original: לטוּשׁם

Transliteration: leṭûshim

Phonetic: let-oo-sheem'

BDB Definition:

Letushim = "hammered"
  1. the 2nd son of Dedan, grandson of Jokshan, great grandson of Abraham by Keturah

Origin: masc. pl. of pass participle of H3913

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Noun
